texto: As for me, God forbid that I should boast about anything except the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ. Because of that cross, my interest in this world died long ago, and the world's interest in me is also long dead.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Galations 6 14 sobre temas ligados a fe. A afirmação “As for me, God forbid that I should boast about anything except the cross of our Lord Jesus Chris…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, bible-verse, jesus, útil em momentos de jesus.
